Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics

Class PostAutoTacticPreferencePage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.DialogPage
org.eclipse.jface.preference.PreferencePage
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.AbstractEventBPreferencePage

All Implemented Interfaces:

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbench workbench)

    • initializeDefaultProperties

      protected void initializeDefaultProperties()
      Description copied from class: AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage
      Method that users should implement, in order to load the values of the project scope preference store with the workspace global values. The user is responsible of the preferences types he wants to use. The user should implement the way that workspace preference values can overwrite the project specific values in case of a defaults restoration when reset is set to true.
      Specified by:
      initializeDefaultProperties in class AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage

    • createFieldEditors

      protected void createFieldEditors(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Description copied from class: AbstractEventBPreferencePage
      Method that users must implement, in order to define the editors they intend to use.
      Overrides:
      createFieldEditors in class AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage
